title: helianthus divaricatus
intro: Helianthus divaricatus, also known as the woodland sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Helianthus divaricatus have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
